code:
import io
import string
import list

fn insert_sorted(_ sorted: List<Int>, _ x: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut inserted = false
  mut i = 0
  let n = sorted.len()
  while i < n
    let v = match sorted.get(i)
    when Some(val)
      val
    when None
      0
    end
    if not inserted and x <= v
      result = list.push(result, x)
      inserted = true
    end
    result = list.push(result, v)
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not inserted
    result = list.push(result, x)
  end
  result
end

fn parse_token(_ s: String) -> Int
  match string.parse_int(s)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
end

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

mut nums: List<Int> = []
mut start = 0
mut i = 0
let n = string.len(line)
while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
  if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
    if start < i
      let tok = string.substring(line, start, i)
      nums = insert_sorted(nums, parse_token(tok))
    end
    start = i + 1
  end
  i = i + 1
end
if start < n
  let tok = string.substring(line, start, n)
  nums = insert_sorted(nums, parse_token(tok))
end

mut out = ""
mut j = 0
let m = nums.len()
while j < m
  let v = match nums.get(j)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if j == 0
    out = "#{v}"
  else
    out = "#{out} #{v}"
  end
  j = j + 1
end
println(out)
